final:
module top_module(
  output reg [3:0] Q,
  input CLK,
  input RST
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or negedge RST or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!RST) begin
      Q <= 4'b0000;
    end
    else begin
      Q <= Q + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
